title: Saro´s Better Glass
description: Arrows fly through glass and shatter it, anvils smash it, entities can break through it — with 3D physics shards on impact.
body:
![Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Better_Glass/MP_SarosBetterGlass_header.webp)

Enhances glass in Minecraft with realistic breaking mechanics and visual effects.
- **Compatibility with [TaCZ] Timeless and Classics Zero**

![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Better_Glass/MP_SarosBetterGlass_description.webp)

Saro's Better Glass Mod transforms the way glass works in Minecraft, making it more realistic and interactive. Experience the satisfaction of breaking glass with arrows, watching anvils smash through glass panes, and seeing glass shatter into realistic shards that slowly disappear.


- **Arrow Glass Breaking**: Arrows can now shoot through glass blocks and break them
- **Anvil Glass Breaking**: Falling anvils will break glass blocks beneath them
- **Realistic Glass Shards**: When glass breaks, it shatters into multiple colored shards that fly outward
- **Fully Configurable**: Adjust all features to your liking

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Better_Glass/MP_SarosBetterGlass_detailed.webp)


### Arrow Glass Breaking
- Arrows can now shoot through glass blocks and break them
- Arrows continue their trajectory after breaking the glass

### Anvil Glass Breaking
- Falling anvils will break glass blocks beneath them

### Realistic Glass Shards
- When glass breaks, it shatters into multiple glass shards
- Shards fly outward from the center of the broken glass
- Different explosion patterns for arrows vs. anvils
- Shards despawn after 10 seconds

### Configuration Options
- Enable/disable each feature individually
- Adjust number of glass shards
- Control glass shard physics
- Enable/disable modded glass support

![Video Demo](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Better_Glass/MP_SarosBetterGlass_video.webp)

**Modpacks:** You are free to include my work in any modpack. Please ensure proper credit is given by providing a link to this project page.
